top_signals.title: China Lets Policy Loan Rate Fall to Record Low to Boost Economy
top_signals.summary: China let the interest rate on a one-year policy loan to banks decline to a record low, according to people familiar with the matter, a sign Beijing is stepping up efforts to support an economy that’s losing momentum.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
